Description: The time, in days, since the intervention was distributed and a multiplier for the **Initial_Effect**. See [example](../json/campaign-waningeffectmapcount_durability_map.json).

The multiplier used to define the magnitude of the shape of the curve, as specified when using the parameters with the **WaningEffectMapLinear** class. See [example](../json/campaign-waningeffectmapcount_initial_effect.json).
An array of values to match the defined **Times**. See [example](../json/campaign-waningeffectmapcount_values.json).
